name: Herbert von Karajan
abstract: Herbert von Karajan (German: [ˈhɛʁbɛʁt fɔn ˈka(ː)ʁajan] ; born Heribert Adolf Ernst Ritter von Karajan; 5 April 1908 – 16 July 1989) was an Austrian conductor. He was principal conductor of the Berlin Philharmonic for 34 years.

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: I’m just trying to think of some of the orchestra conductors that came through that I was able to work with. Good experience, because those names – I don’t hear too much about other names nowadays that are very, very strong. ... Herbert von Karajan
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
